ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., pump, motor, conveyor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the equipment within the facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, vibration, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_scores" (
  "anomaly_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly score */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the anomaly score was calculated from */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Anomaly score value */,
  "raw_score" REAL /* Raw score value */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label indicating whether the anomaly score is normal (0) or anomalous (1) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the anomaly score */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the score */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_scores_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_types" (
  "anomaly_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly type */,
  "anomaly_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the anomaly type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Indicates whether immediate action is required (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_events" (
  "anomaly_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly event */,
  "anomaly_score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly score that triggered the event */,
  "anomaly_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly type */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the anomaly event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly event */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the anomaly event */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_events_anomaly_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_score_id") REFERENCES anomaly_scores ("anomaly_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_events_anomaly_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_type_id") REFERENCES anomaly_types ("anomaly_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "S_t_standard" (
  "S_t_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standardized score */,
  "anomaly_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly event */,
  "S_t_standard" REAL /* Standardized score value */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the standardized score */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("S_t_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_S_t_standard_anomaly_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_event_id") REFERENCES anomaly_events ("anomaly_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "S_t_reward_low_FP_rate" (
  "S_t_reward_low_FP_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward score */,
  "anomaly_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly event */,
  "S_t_reward_low_FP_rate" REAL /* Reward score value */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the reward score */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("S_t_reward_low_FP_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_S_t_reward_low_FP_rate_anomaly_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_event_id") REFERENCES anomaly_events ("anomaly_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "S_t_reward_low_FN_rate" (
  "S_t_reward_low_FN_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward score */,
  "anomaly_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly event */,
  "S_t_reward_low_FN_rate" REAL /* Reward score value */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the reward score */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("S_t_reward_low_FN_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_S_t_reward_low_FN_rate_anomaly_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_event_id") REFERENCES anomaly_events ("anomaly_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, maintenance personnel, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "success" TEXT /* Indicates if the action was successful (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_configurations" (
  "equipment_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment configuration */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration change */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the configuration change */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the configuration change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_configurations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "sensor_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration change */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the configuration change */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the configuration change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_metadata" (
  "data_point_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata details */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_metadata_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_metadata_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
